hero.headline: I craft exceptional web applications.
hero.bio: Hi, I'm Jérémy, a Full-Stack developer. I combine clean design with complex architectures (Node.js & React) to build high-performance, scalable, and sustainable digital products.

services.title: Technical Expertise
services.subtitle: End-to-end mastery of web architecture.
services.frontend_desc: Developing responsive, fluid, and "pixel-perfect" web interfaces with React, placing User Experience (UX) at the core of the code.
services.backend_desc: Designing robust, secure, and scalable APIs using Node.js. Advanced optimization of relational databases (PostgreSQL).
services.perf_desc: Implementing WebSockets, on-the-fly video transcoding, and optimizing response times for highly interactive applications.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Complex systems brought to production.
projects.hypertube_challenge: Develop a Netflix clone allowing movie streaming directly from the BitTorrent network, with OAuth authentication.
projects.hypertube_technical: Node.js engine for downloading P2P fragments. On-the-fly video transcoding via fluent-ffmpeg (using faststart flags) for instant HTTP playback without waiting for the download to finish.
projects.matcha_challenge: Create a comprehensive matching algorithm based on distance, interests, and a popularity score, featuring instant messaging.
projects.matcha_technical: High-performance spatial queries via the PostgreSQL earthdistance extension. WebRTC signaling server (via Socket.io and simple-peer) enabling real-time peer-to-peer video calls.
projects.camagru_subtitle: Photo editing app and social gallery
projects.camagru_challenge: Develop a miniature Instagram clone "from scratch" without any framework, managing video capture, layer assembly, social interactions, and transactional emails.
projects.camagru_technical: Custom MVC architecture and containerized infrastructure (Docker). Webcam stream handled via native getUserMedia API, but image processing and merging strictly calculated server-side. Total security (authentication, hashing, XSS/SQLi flaws) built from the ground up.

contact.title: Let's build what's next.
contact.subtitle: I am currently available for new technical challenges. Whether it's designing an architecture from scratch or optimizing an existing one.
